Dublin 2, Ireland

Payment by Wire Transfer:
Name of Beneficiary: INTAPP IRELAND LIMITED Name of Bank: Bank of America Account Number: 600873542021 IBAN: GB30 BOFA 1650 5073 5420 21 BIC: BOFAGB22 Payments in USD can be processed via wire or ACH. Payments in currencies other than USD must be submitted via wire transfer.
